title: 10 health benefits of Adhatoda vasica (malabar nut)
intro: Adhatoda vasica has health benefits such as relieving respiratory issues and lowering blood pressure. The plant's leaves contain alkaloids like vasicinone and vasicine, which exhibit bronchodilatory properties, making it effective in treating asthma and bronchitis. Its ability to relax blood vessels also helps in reducing hypertension. By consuming malabar nut tea or using its extracts as a medicine, people can experience improved respiratory function, reduced stress, and overall better cardiovascular health, leading to enhanced quality of life and increased energy levels.
